query:
You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 2.1710 (commit: 8feffeee).

## Issue to Resolve

[BUG]: Card remains selected even after unselecting it
### Checked for duplicates?

- [X] This issue is not a duplicate

### What are the steps to reproduce this bug?

- In the Card Browser, select a card.
- Then, select another card and unselect the previous one.

### Expected behaviour

The previous card gets unselected.

### Actual behaviour

The previous card remains selected (as indicated by the selected card count at the top). If you scroll down and then up again, both cards would even show the checkmarks.

### Debug info

```text
2.17 alpha 10
```


### (Optional) Anything else you want to share?

_No response_

### Research

- [X] I am reporting a bug specific to AnkiDroid (Android app)
- [X] I have checked the [manual](https://ankidroid.org/docs/manual.html) and the [FAQ](https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/wiki/FAQ) and could not find a solution to my issue
- [X] (Optional) I have confirmed the issue is not resolved in the latest alpha release ([instructions](https://docs.ankidroid.org/manual.html#betaTesting))

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

* ref: https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/pull/14900
I'm aiming to get this done within 24 hours
This can be worked around by tapping the checkbox, not the row

Will be fixed shortly, sorry for the inconvenience

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardBrowser.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/browser/CardBrowserViewModel.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

 17→package com.ichi2.anki.browser
 18→
 19→import android.content.res.Resources
 20→import androidx.core.content.edit
 21→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
 22→import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
 23→import androidx.lifecycle.viewmodel.initializer
 24→import androidx.lifecycle.viewmodel.viewModelFactory
 25→import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidApp
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.CardBrowser
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.CollectionManager.withCol
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 29→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.ExportDialogParams
 30→import com.ichi2.anki.export.ExportType
 31→import com.ichi2.anki.model.CardsOrNotes
 32→import com.ichi2.anki.model.CardsOrNotes.*
 33→import com.ichi2.anki.model.SortType
 34→import com.ichi2.anki.pages.CardInfoDestination
 35→import com.ichi2.anki.preferences.SharedPreferencesProvider
 36→import com.ichi2.anki.servicelayer.CardService
 37→import com.ichi2.libanki.CardId
 38→import com.ichi2.libanki.Consts
 39→import com.ichi2.libanki.undoableOp
 40→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
 41→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableSharedFlow
 42→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
 43→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.combine
 44→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.flowOf
 45→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.launchIn
 46→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.onEach
 47→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.update
 48→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
 49→import timber.log.Timber
 50→import java.util.Collections
 51→import kotlin.math.max
 52→import kotlin.math.min
 53→
 54→class CardBrowserViewModel(
 55→    preferences: SharedPreferencesProvider
 56→) : ViewModel(), SharedPreferencesProvider by preferences {
 57→    val cards = CardBrowser.CardCollection<CardBrowser.CardCache>()
 58→
 59→    /** The CardIds of all the cards in the results */
 60→    val allCardIds get() = cards.map { c -> c.id }.toLongArray()
 61→
 62→    var searchTerms: String = ""
 63→    var restrictOnDeck: String = ""
 64→    var currentFlag = 0
 65→
 66→    /**
 67→     * Whether the browser is working in Cards mode or Notes mode.
 68→     * default: [CARDS]
 69→     * */
 70→    val cardsOrNotesFlow = MutableStateFlow(CARDS)
 71→    val cardsOrNotes get() = cardsOrNotesFlow.value
 72→
 73→    // card that was clicked (not marked)
 74→    var currentCardId: CardId = 0
 75→    var order = SortType.NO_SORTING
 76→    var orderAsc = false
 77→
 78→    val column1IndexFlow = MutableStateFlow(sharedPrefs().getInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_1_KEY, 0))
 79→    val column2IndexFlow = MutableStateFlow(sharedPrefs().getInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_2_KEY, 0))
 80→    val column1Index get() = column1IndexFlow.value
 81→    val column2Index get() = column2IndexFlow.value
 82→
 83→    /** The query which is currently in the search box, potentially null. Only set when search box was open  */
 84→    var tempSearchQuery: String? = null
 85→
 86→    var isInMultiSelectMode = false
 87→
 88→    val isTruncatedFlow: MutableStateFlow<Boolean> =
 89→        MutableStateFlow(sharedPrefs().getBoolean("isTruncated", false))
 90→    val isTruncated get() = isTruncatedFlow.value
 91→
 92→    private val _selectedRows: MutableSet<CardBrowser.CardCache> = Collections.synchronizedSet(LinkedHashSet())
 93→
 94→    // immutable accessor for _selectedRows
 95→    val selectedRows: Set<CardBrowser.CardCache> get() = _selectedRows
 96→
 97→    private val refreshSelectedRowsFlow = MutableSharedFlow<Unit>()
 98→    val selectedRowsFlow: Flow<Set<CardBrowser.CardCache>> =
 99→        flowOf(selectedRows).combine(refreshSelectedRowsFlow) { row, _ -> row }
100→
101→    val selectedCardIds: List<Long>
102→        get() = selectedRows.map { c -> c.id }
103→    var lastSelectedPosition = 0
104→
105→    val cardInfoDestination: CardInfoDestination?
106→        get() {
107→            val firstSelectedCard = selectedCardIds.firstOrNull() ?: return null
108→            return CardInfoDestination(firstSelectedCard)
109→        }
110→
111→    init {
112→        column1IndexFlow
113→            .onEach { index -> sharedPrefs().edit { putInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_1_KEY, index) } }
114→            .launchIn(viewModelScope)
115→
116→        column2IndexFlow
117→            .onEach { index -> sharedPrefs().edit { putInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_2_KEY, index) } }
118→            .launchIn(viewModelScope)
119→
120→        viewModelScope.launch {
121→            val cardsOrNotes = withCol { CardsOrNotes.fromCollection(this) }
122→            cardsOrNotesFlow.update { cardsOrNotes }
123→        }
124→    }
125→
126→    /** Whether any rows are selected */
127→    fun hasSelectedAnyRows(): Boolean = selectedRows.isNotEmpty()
128→
129→    /**
130→     * All the notes of the selected cards will be marked
131→     * If one or more card is unmarked, all will be marked,
132→     * otherwise, they will be unmarked
133→     */
134→    suspend fun toggleMark(cardIds: List<CardId>) {
135→        if (!hasSelectedAnyRows()) {
136→            Timber.i("Not marking cards - nothing selected")
137→            return
138→        }
139→        undoableOp {
140→            val noteIds = notesOfCards(cardIds)
141→            // if all notes are marked, remove the mark
142→            // if no notes are marked, add the mark
143→            // if there is a mix, enable the mark on all
144→            val wantMark = !noteIds.all { getNote(it).hasTag("marked") }
145→            Timber.i("setting mark = %b for %d notes", wantMark, noteIds.size)
146→            if (wantMark) {
147→                tags.bulkAdd(noteIds, "marked")
148→            } else {
149→                tags.bulkRemove(noteIds, "marked")
150→            }
151→        }
152→    }
153→
154→    /**
155→     * Deletes the selected notes,
156→     * @return the number of deleted notes
157→     */
158→    suspend fun deleteSelectedNotes(): Int =
159→        undoableOp { removeNotes(cids = selectedCardIds) }.count
160→
161→    fun setCardsOrNotes(newValue: CardsOrNotes) = viewModelScope.launch {
162→        withCol {
163→            // Change this to only change the preference on a state change
164→            newValue.saveToCollection(this)
165→        }
166→        cardsOrNotesFlow.update { newValue }
167→    }
168→
169→    fun setTruncated(value: Boolean) {
170→        viewModelScope.launch {
171→            isTruncatedFlow.emit(value)
172→        }
173→        sharedPrefs().edit {
174→            putBoolean("isTruncated", value)
175→        }
176→    }
177→
178→    fun selectAll() {
179→        if (_selectedRows.addAll(cards.wrapped)) {
180→            refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
181→        }
182→    }
183→
184→    fun selectNone() {
185→        if (_selectedRows.isEmpty()) return
186→        _selectedRows.clear()
187→        refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
188→    }
189→
190→    fun toggleRowSelectionAtPosition(position: Int) {
191→        val card = cards[position]
192→        if (_selectedRows.contains(card)) {
193→            _selectedRows.remove(card)
194→        } else {
195→            _selectedRows.add(card)
196→        }
197→        refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
198→    }
199→
200→    fun selectRowAtPosition(pos: Int) {
201→        if (_selectedRows.add(cards[pos])) {
202→            refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
203→        }
204→    }
205→
206→    /**
207→     * Selects the cards between [startPos] and [endPos]
208→     */
209→    fun selectRowsBetweenPositions(startPos: Int, endPos: Int) {
210→        val cards = (min(startPos, endPos)..max(startPos, endPos)).map { cards[it] }
211→        if (_selectedRows.addAll(cards)) {
212→            refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
213→        }
214→    }
215→
216→    /** emits a new value in [selectedRowsFlow] */
217→    private fun refreshSelectedRowsFlow() = viewModelScope.launch {
218→        refreshSelectedRowsFlow.emit(Unit)
219→    }
220→
221→    fun selectedRowCount(): Int = selectedRows.size
222→
223→    fun setColumn1Index(value: Int) = column1IndexFlow.update { value }
224→
225→    fun setColumn2Index(value: Int) = column2IndexFlow.update { value }
226→    suspend fun suspendCards() {
227→        val cardIds = selectedCardIds
228→        if (cardIds.isEmpty()) {
229→            return
230→        }
231→
232→        undoableOp {
233→            // if all cards are suspended, unsuspend all
234→            // if no cards are suspended, suspend all
235→            // if there is a mix, suspend all
236→            val wantUnsuspend = cardIds.all { getCard(it).queue == Consts.QUEUE_TYPE_SUSPENDED }
237→            if (wantUnsuspend) {
238→                sched.unsuspendCards(cardIds)
239→            } else {
240→                sched.suspendCards(cardIds).changes
241→            }
242→        }
243→    }
244→
245→    /** @return an [ExportDialogParams] based on the current screen state */
246→    suspend fun getExportDialogParams(resources: Resources): ExportDialogParams? {
247→        if (!isInMultiSelectMode) return null
248→        return when (cardsOrNotes) {
249→            CARDS -> {
250→                val selectedCardIds = selectedCardIds
251→                ExportDialogParams(
252→                    message = resources.getQuantityString(
253→                        R.plurals.confirm_apkg_export_selected_cards,
254→                        selectedCardIds.size,
255→                        selectedCardIds.size
256→                    ),
257→                    exportType = ExportType.ExportCards(selectedCardIds)
258→                )
259→            }
260→            NOTES -> {
261→                val selectedNoteIds = withCol { CardService.selectedNoteIds(selectedCardIds, this) }
262→                ExportDialogParams(
263→                    message = resources.getQuantityString(
264→                        R.plurals.confirm_apkg_export_selected_notes,
265→                        selectedNoteIds.size,
266→                        selectedNoteIds.size
267→                    ),
268→                    exportType = ExportType.ExportNotes(selectedNoteIds)
269→                )
270→            }
271→        }
272→    }
273→
274→    /**
275→     * @see [com.ichi2.libanki.sched.Scheduler.sortCards]
276→     * @return the number of cards which were repositioned
277→     */
278→    suspend fun repositionSelectedRows(position: Int) = undoableOp {
279→        sched.sortCards(selectedCardIds, position, 1, shuffle = false, shift = true)
280→    }.count
281→
282→    /** Returns the number of rows of the current result set  */
283→    val rowCount: Int
284→        get() = cards.size()
285→
286→    fun getCardIdAtPosition(position: Int): CardId = cards[position].id
287→
288→    fun getRowAtPosition(position: Int) = cards[position]
289→
290→    /** Given a card ID, returns a position-aware card */
291→    fun findCardById(id: CardId): CardBrowser.CardCache? = cards.find { it.id == id }
292→
293→    val cardIdToPositionMap: Map<CardId, Int>
294→        get() = cards.mapIndexed { i, c -> c.id to i }.toMap()
295→
296→    override fun onCleared() {
297→        super.onCleared()
298→        invalidate()
299→    }
300→
301→    private fun invalidate() {
302→        // TODO: this may no longer be needed now we call invalidate from onCleared
303→        cards.clear()
304→        selectNone()
305→    }
306→
307→    companion object {
308→        const val DISPLAY_COLUMN_1_KEY = "cardBrowserColumn1"
309→        const val DISPLAY_COLUMN_2_KEY = "cardBrowserColumn2"
310→        fun factory(preferencesProvider: SharedPreferencesProvider? = null) = viewModelFactory {
311→            initializer {
312→                CardBrowserViewModel(preferencesProvider ?: AnkiDroidApp.sharedPreferencesProvider)
313→            }
314→        }
315→    }
316→}
317→

content.text:
Now I understand the issue. Let me look at the specific problem:

1. In multi-select mode, when a user clicks on a card row (line 542-547), the code does:
   - `cb.toggle()` - toggles the checkbox visual state
   - `viewModel.selectRowAtPosition(position)` - only ADDS to selection, never removes

2. The `selectRowAtPosition` function only adds cards to the selection set, it doesn't toggle. So when clicking an already-selected row, the checkbox becomes unchecked visually but remains selected in the ViewModel.

3. The checkbox click handler (line 1837) correctly uses `toggleRowSelectionAtPosition`, but the row click handler uses `selectRowAtPosition`.

The fix is to change the row click handler to use `toggleRowSelectionAtPosition` instead of `selectRowAtPosition`.

conversation_history.name: read

content.text:
The test helper function `selectRowsWithPositions` uses `selectRowAtPosition`, which is still valid for programmatically selecting rows (it only adds, doesn't toggle). This is fine for test setup purposes.

Let me verify the fix is complete by examining the flow:

1. **Before the fix**: When clicking a card row in multi-select mode:
   - `cb.toggle()` toggles the checkbox visual state
   - `viewModel.selectRowAtPosition(position)` only ADDS the card to selection (never removes)
   - Result: If a card was already selected, the checkbox would visually toggle OFF but the card would remain selected in the ViewModel

2. **After the fix**: When clicking a card row in multi-select mode:
   - `cb.toggle()` toggles the checkbox visual state
   - `viewModel.toggleRowSelectionAtPosition(position)` properly ADDS or REMOVES the card from selection
   - Result: The checkbox visual state and the ViewModel selection state are always in sync

The fix is minimal and targeted - it only changes the single line that was causing the bug. The `selectRowAtPosition` function is still available for programmatic use (like in tests), but the UI now uses the correct toggle function.

Let me also make sure there are no other places where this pattern might be wrong:

568→                recenterListView(view)
569→                cardsAdapter.notifyDataSetChanged()
570→            }
571→            true
572→        }
573→        window.setSoftInputMode(WindowManager.LayoutParams.SOFT_INPUT_STATE_ALWAYS_HIDDEN)

content.text:
Both places where `cb.toggle()` is used now correctly call `toggleRowSelectionAtPosition`. The fix is complete.

## Summary

**Root Cause**: In the Card Browser's multi-select mode, when clicking on a card row, the code was calling `viewModel.selectRowAtPosition(position)` which only **adds** cards to the selection set but never removes them. However, the checkbox was being visually toggled with `cb.toggle()`. This caused a mismatch between:
- The visual state (checkbox appears unchecked after toggle)
- The actual selection state (card remains selected in ViewModel)

**Fix**: Changed line 547 in `CardBrowser.kt` from:
```kotlin
viewModel.selectRowAtPosition(position)
```
to:
```kotlin
viewModel.toggleRowSelectionAtPosition(position)
```

This ensures that when a user clicks on a card row in multi-select mode:
1. The checkbox visual state is toggled (`cb.toggle()`)
2. The ViewModel selection is properly toggled - adding if not selected, removing if already selected (`toggleRowSelectionAtPosition`)

This keeps the visual checkbox state and the ViewModel selection state always in sync, fixing the bug where cards remained selected even after unselecting them.

 17→package com.ichi2.anki.browser
 18→
 19→import android.content.res.Resources
 20→import androidx.core.content.edit
 21→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
 22→import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
 23→import androidx.lifecycle.viewmodel.initializer
 24→import androidx.lifecycle.viewmodel.viewModelFactory
 25→import com.ichi2.anki.AnkiDroidApp
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.CardBrowser
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.CollectionManager.withCol
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 29→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.ExportDialogParams
 30→import com.ichi2.anki.export.ExportType
 31→import com.ichi2.anki.model.CardsOrNotes
 32→import com.ichi2.anki.model.CardsOrNotes.*
 33→import com.ichi2.anki.model.SortType
 34→import com.ichi2.anki.pages.CardInfoDestination
 35→import com.ichi2.anki.preferences.SharedPreferencesProvider
 36→import com.ichi2.anki.servicelayer.CardService
 37→import com.ichi2.libanki.CardId
 38→import com.ichi2.libanki.Consts
 39→import com.ichi2.libanki.undoableOp
 40→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
 41→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableSharedFlow
 42→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
 43→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.combine
 44→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.flowOf
 45→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.launchIn
 46→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.onEach
 47→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.update
 48→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
 49→import timber.log.Timber
 50→import java.util.Collections
 51→import kotlin.math.max
 52→import kotlin.math.min
 53→
 54→class CardBrowserViewModel(
 55→    preferences: SharedPreferencesProvider
 56→) : ViewModel(), SharedPreferencesProvider by preferences {
 57→    val cards = CardBrowser.CardCollection<CardBrowser.CardCache>()
 58→
 59→    /** The CardIds of all the cards in the results */
 60→    val allCardIds get() = cards.map { c -> c.id }.toLongArray()
 61→
 62→    var searchTerms: String = ""
 63→    var restrictOnDeck: String = ""
 64→    var currentFlag = 0
 65→
 66→    /**
 67→     * Whether the browser is working in Cards mode or Notes mode.
 68→     * default: [CARDS]
 69→     * */
 70→    val cardsOrNotesFlow = MutableStateFlow(CARDS)
 71→    val cardsOrNotes get() = cardsOrNotesFlow.value
 72→
 73→    // card that was clicked (not marked)
 74→    var currentCardId: CardId = 0
 75→    var order = SortType.NO_SORTING
 76→    var orderAsc = false
 77→
 78→    val column1IndexFlow = MutableStateFlow(sharedPrefs().getInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_1_KEY, 0))
 79→    val column2IndexFlow = MutableStateFlow(sharedPrefs().getInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_2_KEY, 0))
 80→    val column1Index get() = column1IndexFlow.value
 81→    val column2Index get() = column2IndexFlow.value
 82→
 83→    /** The query which is currently in the search box, potentially null. Only set when search box was open  */
 84→    var tempSearchQuery: String? = null
 85→
 86→    var isInMultiSelectMode = false
 87→
 88→    val isTruncatedFlow: MutableStateFlow<Boolean> =
 89→        MutableStateFlow(sharedPrefs().getBoolean("isTruncated", false))
 90→    val isTruncated get() = isTruncatedFlow.value
 91→
 92→    private val _selectedRows: MutableSet<CardBrowser.CardCache> = Collections.synchronizedSet(LinkedHashSet())
 93→
 94→    // immutable accessor for _selectedRows
 95→    val selectedRows: Set<CardBrowser.CardCache> get() = _selectedRows
 96→
 97→    private val refreshSelectedRowsFlow = MutableSharedFlow<Unit>()
 98→    val selectedRowsFlow: Flow<Set<CardBrowser.CardCache>> =
 99→        flowOf(selectedRows).combine(refreshSelectedRowsFlow) { row, _ -> row }
100→
101→    val selectedCardIds: List<Long>
102→        get() = selectedRows.map { c -> c.id }
103→    var lastSelectedPosition = 0
104→
105→    val cardInfoDestination: CardInfoDestination?
106→        get() {
107→            val firstSelectedCard = selectedCardIds.firstOrNull() ?: return null
108→            return CardInfoDestination(firstSelectedCard)
109→        }
110→
111→    init {
112→        column1IndexFlow
113→            .onEach { index -> sharedPrefs().edit { putInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_1_KEY, index) } }
114→            .launchIn(viewModelScope)
115→
116→        column2IndexFlow
117→            .onEach { index -> sharedPrefs().edit { putInt(DISPLAY_COLUMN_2_KEY, index) } }
118→            .launchIn(viewModelScope)
119→
120→        viewModelScope.launch {
121→            val cardsOrNotes = withCol { CardsOrNotes.fromCollection(this) }
122→            cardsOrNotesFlow.update { cardsOrNotes }
123→        }
124→    }
125→
126→    /** Whether any rows are selected */
127→    fun hasSelectedAnyRows(): Boolean = selectedRows.isNotEmpty()
128→
129→    /**
130→     * All the notes of the selected cards will be marked
131→     * If one or more card is unmarked, all will be marked,
132→     * otherwise, they will be unmarked
133→     */
134→    suspend fun toggleMark(cardIds: List<CardId>) {
135→        if (!hasSelectedAnyRows()) {
136→            Timber.i("Not marking cards - nothing selected")
137→            return
138→        }
139→        undoableOp {
140→            val noteIds = notesOfCards(cardIds)
141→            // if all notes are marked, remove the mark
142→            // if no notes are marked, add the mark
143→            // if there is a mix, enable the mark on all
144→            val wantMark = !noteIds.all { getNote(it).hasTag("marked") }
145→            Timber.i("setting mark = %b for %d notes", wantMark, noteIds.size)
146→            if (wantMark) {
147→                tags.bulkAdd(noteIds, "marked")
148→            } else {
149→                tags.bulkRemove(noteIds, "marked")
150→            }
151→        }
152→    }
153→
154→    /**
155→     * Deletes the selected notes,
156→     * @return the number of deleted notes
157→     */
158→    suspend fun deleteSelectedNotes(): Int =
159→        undoableOp { removeNotes(cids = selectedCardIds) }.count
160→
161→    fun setCardsOrNotes(newValue: CardsOrNotes) = viewModelScope.launch {
162→        withCol {
163→            // Change this to only change the preference on a state change
164→            newValue.saveToCollection(this)
165→        }
166→        cardsOrNotesFlow.update { newValue }
167→    }
168→
169→    fun setTruncated(value: Boolean) {
170→        viewModelScope.launch {
171→            isTruncatedFlow.emit(value)
172→        }
173→        sharedPrefs().edit {
174→            putBoolean("isTruncated", value)
175→        }
176→    }
177→
178→    fun selectAll() {
179→        if (_selectedRows.addAll(cards.wrapped)) {
180→            refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
181→        }
182→    }
183→
184→    fun selectNone() {
185→        if (_selectedRows.isEmpty()) return
186→        _selectedRows.clear()
187→        refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
188→    }
189→
190→    fun toggleRowSelectionAtPosition(position: Int) {
191→        val card = cards[position]
192→        if (_selectedRows.contains(card)) {
193→            _selectedRows.remove(card)
194→        } else {
195→            _selectedRows.add(card)
196→        }
197→        refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
198→    }
199→
200→    fun selectRowAtPosition(pos: Int) {
201→        if (_selectedRows.add(cards[pos])) {
202→            refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
203→        }
204→    }
205→
206→    /**
207→     * Selects the cards between [startPos] and [endPos]
208→     */
209→    fun selectRowsBetweenPositions(startPos: Int, endPos: Int) {
210→        val cards = (min(startPos, endPos)..max(startPos, endPos)).map { cards[it] }
211→        if (_selectedRows.addAll(cards)) {
212→            refreshSelectedRowsFlow()
213→        }
214→    }
215→
216→    /** emits a new value in [selectedRowsFlow] */
217→    private fun refreshSelectedRowsFlow() = viewModelScope.launch {
218→        refreshSelectedRowsFlow.emit(Unit)
219→    }
220→
221→    fun selectedRowCount(): Int = selectedRows.size
222→
223→    fun setColumn1Index(value: Int) = column1IndexFlow.update { value }
224→
225→    fun setColumn2Index(value: Int) = column2IndexFlow.update { value }
226→    suspend fun suspendCards() {
227→        val cardIds = selectedCardIds
228→        if (cardIds.isEmpty()) {
229→            return
230→        }
231→
232→        undoableOp {
233→            // if all cards are suspended, unsuspend all
234→            // if no cards are suspended, suspend all
235→            // if there is a mix, suspend all
236→            val wantUnsuspend = cardIds.all { getCard(it).queue == Consts.QUEUE_TYPE_SUSPENDED }
237→            if (wantUnsuspend) {
238→                sched.unsuspendCards(cardIds)
239→            } else {
240→                sched.suspendCards(cardIds).changes
241→            }
242→        }
243→    }
244→
245→    /** @return an [ExportDialogParams] based on the current screen state */
246→    suspend fun getExportDialogParams(resources: Resources): ExportDialogParams? {
247→        if (!isInMultiSelectMode) return null
248→        return when (cardsOrNotes) {
249→            CARDS -> {
250→                val selectedCardIds = selectedCardIds
251→                ExportDialogParams(
252→                    message = resources.getQuantityString(
253→                        R.plurals.confirm_apkg_export_selected_cards,
254→                        selectedCardIds.size,
255→                        selectedCardIds.size
256→                    ),
257→                    exportType = ExportType.ExportCards(selectedCardIds)
258→                )
259→            }
260→            NOTES -> {
261→                val selectedNoteIds = withCol { CardService.selectedNoteIds(selectedCardIds, this) }
262→                ExportDialogParams(
263→                    message = resources.getQuantityString(
264→                        R.plurals.confirm_apkg_export_selected_notes,
265→                        selectedNoteIds.size,
266→                        selectedNoteIds.size
267→                    ),
268→                    exportType = ExportType.ExportNotes(selectedNoteIds)
269→                )
270→            }
271→        }
272→    }
273→
274→    /**
275→     * @see [com.ichi2.libanki.sched.Scheduler.sortCards]
276→     * @return the number of cards which were repositioned
277→     */
278→    suspend fun repositionSelectedRows(position: Int) = undoableOp {
279→        sched.sortCards(selectedCardIds, position, 1, shuffle = false, shift = true)
280→    }.count
281→
282→    /** Returns the number of rows of the current result set  */
283→    val rowCount: Int
284→        get() = cards.size()
285→
286→    fun getCardIdAtPosition(position: Int): CardId = cards[position].id
287→
288→    fun getRowAtPosition(position: Int) = cards[position]
289→
290→    /** Given a card ID, returns a position-aware card */
291→    fun findCardById(id: CardId): CardBrowser.CardCache? = cards.find { it.id == id }
292→
293→    val cardIdToPositionMap: Map<CardId, Int>
294→        get() = cards.mapIndexed { i, c -> c.id to i }.toMap()
295→
296→    override fun onCleared() {
297→        super.onCleared()
298→        invalidate()
299→    }
300→
301→    private fun invalidate() {
302→        // TODO: this may no longer be needed now we call invalidate from onCleared
303→        cards.clear()
304→        selectNone()
305→    }
306→
307→    companion object {
308→        const val DISPLAY_COLUMN_1_KEY = "cardBrowserColumn1"
309→        const val DISPLAY_COLUMN_2_KEY = "cardBrowserColumn2"
310→        fun factory(preferencesProvider: SharedPreferencesProvider? = null) = viewModelFactory {
311→            initializer {
312→                CardBrowserViewModel(preferencesProvider ?: AnkiDroidApp.sharedPreferencesProvider)
313→            }
314→        }
315→    }
316→}
